title: User storage quota check
difficulty_justification: Single lookup of own quota from filesystem tool with no cross-source reasoning.
query_text: How much of my storage quota on /lustre/scratch have I used, and when will I hit the limit if I continue at current consumption?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: User alice has used 142.3 GB of the 200 GB quota (71.2%). At the current consumption rate no grace period is active. If consumption continues at a rate of ~4 GB/day (estimated from recent I/O metrics), the quota will be reached in approximately 14–15 days. Recommendation: check /docs/storage_user_guide.md for tips on reducing usage or request a quota increase.

checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: trace contains filesystem.get_quota call for user alice

checkpoints.description: Agent reports usage as 142.3/200 GB or ~71%.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer contains value in [140, 145] GB or percentage in [70%, 72%]
